title: Romantic Vietnamese Vegetables Nem Nuong
description: A romantic vegetarian twist on Vietnamese nem nuong, featuring aromatic panang curry paste and sweet confit tomatoes. These fluffy tofu rolls are wrapped in crisp lettuce and finished with fresh herbs and a splash of lime.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp oil in a skillet over medium-high and sauté tofu until golden, about 5 minutes.
Saute remaining oil, add panang curry paste, cook 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add confit tomatoes and bell pepper, cook 3 minutes until softened.
Return tofu to skillet, stir to coat, cook 2 minutes.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
Assemble nem nuong by placing tofu mixture on a lettuce leaf and topping with cucumber, cilantro, and a squeeze of lime.
Serve immediately with extra lime wedges.
